question: How do I check my Jazz balance?
answer: Dial *111# from your Jazz number or open the Jazz World app and tap Balance on the home screen.

question: Balance kaise check karun?
answer: Apne Jazz number se *111# dial karein ya Jazz World app khol kar home screen par Balance par tap karein.

question: Why is my balance showing zero?
answer: Your balance may be zero if you recently used all credit, have an active package that consumed balance, or if there is a temporary network delay. Wait a few minutes and check again.

question: Mera balance zero kyun aa raha hai?
answer: Agar aap ne credit use kar liya ho, package active ho, ya network delay ho to balance zero dikh sakta hai. Kuch minute baad dobara check karein.

question: How do I subscribe to a Jazz package?
answer: Open the Jazz World app, go to Packages, choose your preferred bundle, and tap Subscribe. You can also dial the package code from the Jazz website.

question: Jazz package kaise subscribe karun?
answer: Jazz World app kholen, Packages par jayen, apna bundle select karein, aur Subscribe par tap karein. Website se package code bhi dial kar sakte hain.

question: How do I unsubscribe from a package?
answer: To unsubscribe, dial the package unsubscribe code or go to Jazz World app, open My Subscriptions, and tap Unsubscribe on the active package.

question: Package unsubscribe kaise karun?
answer: Unsubscribe code dial karein ya Jazz World app mein My Subscriptions khol kar active package par Unsubscribe tap karein.

question: How can I recharge my Jazz number?
answer: You can recharge via JazzCash, easypaisa, bank apps, scratch cards, or retail shops. Open JazzCash, select Mobile Load, enter your number and amount.

question: Jazz number recharge kaise karun?
answer: JazzCash, easypaisa, bank apps, scratch card ya shop se recharge kar sakte hain. JazzCash khol kar Mobile Load select karein aur number amount enter karein.

question: My recharge failed but money was deducted.
answer: If recharge failed, wait 15 minutes for auto-reversal. If not reversed, open Jazz World app, go to Help, and submit a recharge complaint with transaction ID.

question: Recharge fail ho gaya lekin paise kat gaye.
answer: 15 minute wait karein auto-reversal ke liye. Agar reversal na ho to Jazz World app se Help mein ja kar transaction ID ke sath complaint submit karein.

question: How do I create a JazzCash account?
answer: Download the JazzCash app, register with your CNIC and mobile number, verify OTP, and set your MPIN. Visit a Jazz retailer for biometric verification if required.

question: JazzCash account kaise banayein?
answer: JazzCash app download karein, CNIC aur mobile number se register karein, OTP verify karein, aur MPIN set karein. Zarurat par retailer se biometric verification karwayen.

question: I forgot my JazzCash MPIN.
answer: Open JazzCash app, tap Forgot MPIN, verify with OTP and CNIC details, then set a new MPIN. Do not share your MPIN with anyone.

question: JazzCash MPIN bhool gaya hoon.
answer: JazzCash app khol kar Forgot MPIN par tap karein, OTP aur CNIC se verify karein, phir naya MPIN set karein. MPIN kisi ke sath share na karein.

question: How do I send money via JazzCash?
answer: Open JazzCash, tap Send Money, enter recipient mobile number or IBAN, amount, and MPIN to confirm. Both sender and receiver must have verified accounts.

question: JazzCash se paise kaise bhejein?
answer: JazzCash khol kar Send Money par tap karein, number ya IBAN aur amount enter karein, MPIN se confirm karein. Dono accounts verified hone chahiye.

question: How do I activate a new Jazz SIM?
answer: Insert the SIM, dial 123 or follow the SMS instructions, complete biometric verification at a Jazz franchise, and your SIM will activate within a few hours.

question: Naya Jazz SIM kaise activate karun?
answer: SIM lagayen, 123 dial karein ya SMS instructions follow karein, franchise par biometric verification karein, SIM kuch ghanton mein activate ho jayega.

question: How do I block a lost SIM?
answer: Immediately call Jazz helpline 111 or visit a Jazz service center with your CNIC to block the SIM and request a duplicate if needed.

question: Khoya hua SIM block kaise karun?
answer: Fori Jazz helpline 111 par call karein ya CNIC le kar service center jayen SIM block aur duplicate ke liye.

question: My mobile internet is not working.
answer: Check if data is enabled, airplane mode is off, and you have an active data package. Restart your phone and try another APN setting if the issue continues.

question: Mobile internet kaam nahi kar raha.
answer: Data on hai, airplane mode off hai, aur package active hai ye check karein. Phone restart karein, masla rahe to APN settings check karein.

question: How do I check remaining internet MBs?
answer: Dial *443# or open Jazz World app and go to Usage to see remaining data, minutes, and SMS from your active package.

question: Baqi internet MBs kaise dekhein?
answer: *443# dial karein ya Jazz World app mein Usage khol kar baqi data, minutes aur SMS dekhein.

question: How do I register a complaint with Jazz?
answer: Open Jazz World app, go to Help and Support, select Complaint, choose the issue type, and submit details. You will receive a ticket number.

question: Jazz mein complaint kaise register karun?
answer: Jazz World app khol kar Help and Support mein Complaint select karein, issue type choose karein, details submit karein. Aap ko ticket number milega.

question: How long does Jazz take to resolve complaints?
answer: Most complaints are resolved within 24 to 72 hours depending on the issue type. Track status in Jazz World app using your ticket number.

question: Jazz complaint kitne time mein solve hoti hai?
answer: Ziyada tar complaints 24 se 72 ghanton mein resolve hoti hain. Jazz World app mein ticket number se status track karein.

question: I cannot log in to Jazz World app.
answer: Ensure you are using the registered Jazz number, update the app to the latest version, clear cache, and verify OTP. Contact support if login still fails.

question: Jazz World app mein login nahi ho raha.
answer: Registered Jazz number use karein, app update karein, cache clear karein, aur OTP verify karein. Phir bhi masla ho to support se rabta karein.

question: How do I reset Jazz World app password?
answer: On the login screen tap Forgot Password, enter your mobile number, verify OTP, and set a new password. Use a strong password you do not share.

question: Jazz World app password reset kaise karun?
answer: Login screen par Forgot Password tap karein, number enter karein, OTP verify karein, naya password set karein.

question: How do I get my Jazz postpaid bill?
answer: Postpaid customers can view and download bills from Jazz World app under Billing, or receive bills via email and SMS each billing cycle.

question: Jazz postpaid bill kaise hasil karun?
answer: Jazz World app mein Billing se bill dekhen ya download karein. Har billing cycle par email aur SMS par bill bhi milta hai.

question: How do I pay my postpaid bill?
answer: Pay via JazzCash, bank apps, ATM, or Jazz franchise. Open JazzCash, select Bill Payment, choose Jazz Postpaid, enter account number and amount.

question: Postpaid bill kaise pay karun?
answer: JazzCash, bank app, ATM ya franchise se pay karein. JazzCash mein Bill Payment select kar ke account number aur amount enter karein.

question: How do I find current Jazz offers?
answer: Open Jazz World app and go to Offers, or dial *551# to see active promotions, discounts, and limited-time bundles for your number.

question: Current Jazz offers kahan milenge?
answer: Jazz World app mein Offers kholen ya *551# dial karein taake promotions aur bundles dekh saken.

question: Why am I not eligible for a Jazz offer?
answer: Some offers are targeted by usage, region, or customer type. Ensure your SIM is active, bills are paid, and check eligibility details in the offer terms.

question: Mujhe Jazz offer eligible kyun nahi?
answer: Kuch offers usage, region ya customer type par depend karte hain. SIM active ho, bills paid hon, aur offer terms mein eligibility check karein.
